name: Fruit Salad with Camembert Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cheese, including the rind, in a blender or food processor.
2. Add the sour cream and pulse until the mixture is very smooth.
3. Cover and refrigerate if not using right away.
4. Slice the nectarines and pears into wedges or bite-sized pieces.
5. Arrange all the fruits in lettuce-lined bowls or on a lettuce-lined platter.
6. Drizzle or spoon the dressing over top and serve. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
Variations: Brie can be used in place of Camembert, and peaches can replace the nectarines.
